262.code: else if(now == "if" || now == "for" || now == "break" || now == "return") Stmt();
262.reason: [The condition only handles a few specific Stmt starting tokens, but Stmt can also start with '{', ';', 'printf', LVal, etc. This causes the while loop to get stuck in an infinite loop when encountering these tokens, as no action is taken and Index never advances.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition only handles a few specific Stmt starting tokens, but Stmt can also start with '{', ';', 'printf', LVal, etc. This causes the while loop to get stuck in an infinite loop when encountering these tokens, as no action is taken and Index never advances.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition does not cover all possible starting tokens of Stmt, such as '{', ';', 'printf', identifiers, etc., causing the while loop to potentially get stuck or skip valid statements.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Error: Incorrectly pushes non-terminal tag during lookahead check. This causes duplicate and misplaced output tags, as the actual parsing functions (e.g., MulExp) also push the tag upon completion. Helper functions for operator checking should only return boolean values.

158.reason: [Incorrect handling of character literals: assumes 2-char content (e.g., '\n'), but doesn't validate length or handle single-char like 'a' properly; may go out-of-bounds]
